crime.value: Kidnapping of Professor Albert for ransom and his inventions
crime.quote: P-P-Professor Albert has gone mi-mi- missing

victim.value: Professor Albert, targeted for his valuable inventions, particularly a camera that predicts the future
victim.quote: The camera that tells you what will happen in the same spot in 24 hours

closed_world.value: Limited group of suspects known to the detective: twins Rebecca and Alice, Richard, and Pat
closed_world.quote: I thought of everyone that could've kidnapped him. The twins? Maybe... Richard? Possibly... Pat? Hmm...

culprit_and_motive.value: Pat (the police officer) orchestrated the kidnapping, working with Richard and the twins for money and Albert's inventions
culprit_and_motive.quote: He was the one who kidnapped me!! Vaughn I see you have a terrible bleed on your leg.

resolution.value: The detective rescues Albert during the final exchange, though the criminals escape with some items
resolution.quote: Richard, Rebecca, Alice and Pat have left!!

investigator.value: Vaughn, a blind detective who uses a walking cane and relies on other senses to solve crimes
investigator.quote: Why did you call the greatest detective at 4 in the morning?

suspect_architecture.value: Four suspects with clear differentiation: twins Rebecca/Alice (kidnappers for hire), Richard (mastermind with financial motive), Pat (inside accomplice with access), each with distinct roles in the kidnapping scheme
suspect_architecture.quote: Richard, Rebecca, Alice and Pat have left!! ... Pat was the one who kidnapped me!!

red_herring.value: Monopoly money substitution - Pat deliberately uses fake money in the ransom exchange while claiming to follow detective's instructions, misdirecting from his true complicity
red_herring.quote: did you remember to put monopoly money in the suitcase? Yes sir. ... 3 unopened monopoly games in his rooms

clue_fairness.value: The Braille wanted poster describing the suspects is presented to the reader exactly as the blind detective reads it, providing fair access to suspect descriptions
clue_fairness.quote: identical female twins. Age: 14, Hair: Long and brown, Eyes: Brown ... Male Age: 26 ... Name: Richard

social_world.value: Detective-assistant power dynamic where Pat exploits his trusted position and the detective's blindness-induced dependency to orchestrate the inside betrayal
social_world.quote: Ever since I have been blind, I have never opened the door ... Pat was the one who kidnapped me!!

alibi.value: Pat maintains false presence as helpful assistant throughout the investigation while secretly coordinating with kidnappers and providing inside information
alibi.quote: W-we have s-s-searched everywhere for h-him, but he has not been f-found ... Pat was involved in this

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence of Pat's deception discovered at the crime scene - the missing safe key and camera, plus surplus monopoly games revealing the money switch
reveal_mechanic.quote: the key of our safe was missing and Albert's camera was missing as well ... 3 unopened monopoly games

media_and_audience.value: Public mockery of the blind detective by teenagers reflects social attitudes that the criminals likely exploit in underestimating his capabilities
media_and_audience.quote: Hey there's that blind guy talking to himself again!! Go get some real friends!

investigator_wound.value: The detective's blindness creates vulnerability to betrayal by trusted assistants, exploited when Pat uses his position of trust to orchestrate the inside job
investigator_wound.quote: Ever since I have been blind, I have never opened the door. This was the 1st time.

_meta.title: ebook anzy irani the case of the missing scientist
